jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at CRISIL
jsonLd.description:
CRISIL is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About CRISIL:
CRISIL is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CRISIL!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
